title: bulbophyllum fonsflorum
intro: Bulbophyllum fonsflorum, also known as the spring fountain orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum fonsflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a potential remedy for various diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or oil, and can be used as a decoction, tincture, or topical application.
